expectations.text: Every command in the workflow would actually succeed if run (no interactive-only commands in automated context, no server-admin commands, no missing required flags)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 uses 'clams init' which is interactive — it blocks waiting for stdin. In a non-interactive context like a subagent, this would hang indefinitely.

expectations.text: Configures the Electrum onchain source before creating the XPub connection (required dependency)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 (onchain create) precedes Step 4 (connections create --kind XPub).

expectations.text: XPub connection configuration includes address_types, gap_limit, and network fields (not just the bare xpub key)
expectations.evidence: Config JSON is only {"xpub":"..."} — missing address_types, gap_limit, wallet_first_tx_block_height, and network. May use defaults but risks wrong address derivation.

expectations.text: Runs journals process after sync and before generating any report
expectations.evidence: Step 6 (journals process) comes after Step 5 (sync) and before Step 7 (balance-sheet).

expectations.text: The workflow ends with the user seeing their balance (balance sheet or portfolio summary)
expectations.evidence: Step 7: clams reports balance-sheet. Step 8: clams reports portfolio-summary.

expectations.text: Commands whose output feeds into subsequent steps use --machine --format json so the output can be reliably parsed
expectations.evidence: No commands use --machine --format json. The workspace ID from Step 1 needs to be passed to subsequent steps but there's no structured output to parse.
